title: The Cartographer of Grosvenor Square
description: Miss Honora Finch draws maps under a man's name because no London publisher will buy them under her own. When the Earl of Wexley commissions a survey of his estate, he expects a Mr. H. Finch — and gets, instead, a woman who knows his land better than he does. A Regency romance of disguise, pride, and the careful undrawing of a lie.
